content.en:
Black Wind Mountain, the small realm of the Wind King.

The ruins of the Nine Shadows Sect branch have been completed into a space, and a large number of True Ancestors are excavating this ruin.

However, this ruin is too big, there are too many buildings and treasures, and many of the prohibitions are very complicated, if you don't want to destroy them, you have to break them slowly, and it will take a long time.

Ye Tian, General Motian, and General Bloody Demon stood outside the prohibition where the Nine Secluded Forbidden Pools were located, looking at this prohibition and studying it silently.

"This prohibition is very complicated, and it uses the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool as the source of energy, if it is forcibly broken, it will not be possible to do it with our current strength, unless all the True Ancestors work together, but that will damage the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, this method is not advisable. So, we can only crack it slowly, but in this case, it will take at least a million years to really crack it!" said the bloody general in a low voice.

There is no way, there are not many True Ancestors in Black Wind Mountain who are good at forbidden formations, and they are not necessarily more powerful than Zixia Sect.

Therefore, Black Wind Mountain can't quickly break the ban.

At this time, Ye Tian spoke: "I know a true ancestor, she is good at breaking the ban, and there is a way to break the ban quickly. This True Ancestor is the True Ancestor I said before that I was the first to discover the ancient ruins excavated by the Zixia Sect, I can let her break the ban, and there is no need to wait for millions of years!"

"Oh, and there are people like that?"

The Ferris General and the Blood General rejoiced.

Although Ouyang Jiu'er was not from Black Wind Mountain, as long as he had the permission of the Dao Ancestor, he could also enter the small realm of the Wind King.

The Ferris General contacted the Wind King and got permission.

So, Ye Tian brought Ouyang Jiu'er into the small realm of the Wind King.

"This is Ouyang Jiu'er!" Ye Tian introduced to General Motian and General Blood.

Ouyang Jiu'er entered the small realm of the Wind King, not a little nervous or afraid, but very curious, looking around.

General Ferris and General Bloody had a brief chat with Ouyang Jiu'er, and then let Ouyang Jiu'er enter the ruins of the Nine Shades Branch and come to the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool.

Ouyang Jiu'er was also very curious when he saw the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool for the first time, but he still broke the ban at Ye Tian's urging.

With her half-step domain ancestor's knowledge, she naturally quickly understood this prohibition thoroughly.

It's just that due to the problem of cultivation, she can't break the ban instantly, and it will take a little time.

Of course, she won't crack it with all her might, otherwise it will be too suspicious.

So, Ouyang Jiu'er spoke: "Three hundred years, I am sure that I will break the ban within three hundred years!"

"Three hundred years, so fast!"

The Ferris General and the Blood General were greatly surprised.

Originally, in their prediction, Ouyang Jiu'er would be very evil if he could break the ban in 10,000 years, but he didn't expect that it would only take 300 years.

In fact, if Ouyang Jiu'er wasn't afraid of arousing suspicion, she would have been able to break the ban in a year.

Next, Ouyang Jiu'er broke the ban here, and many true ancestors such as Ye Tian, General Motian, and General Bloody were waiting here.

Three hundred years is not a long time for them, and they are not worried that Ouyang Jiu'er will break the ban here alone, after all, Ouyang Jiu'er is not the true ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, and he needs to be watched over at all times.

If Ouyang Jiu'er was willing to join Black Wind Mountain, there would be no problem.

It's a pity that Ouyang Jiu'er rejected Black Wind Mountain's invitation.

General Ferris and General Bloody didn't understand why Ouyang Jiu'er refused, but Ye Tian knew very well.

The reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor, what are the benefits of joining Black Wind Mountain, that is impossible!

Although he didn't know why Ouyang Jiu'er was reincarnated, with Ouyang Jiu'er's ability, it was definitely not difficult to return to the half-step domain ancestor realm.

Besides, he still doesn't know much about Ouyang Jiu'er's combat power, because Ouyang Jiu'er has never made a move.

He wouldn't really believe that Ouyang Jiu'er was just a top-notch True Ancestor combat power, if he was really so simple, then it would be a shame!

In the blink of an eye, three hundred years have passed.

this day.

Ouyang Jiu'er completely broke the ban, and the ban collapsed at an extremely fast speed as if the ice and snow had melted, dissipating into nothingness.

"Get in!"

Many True Ancestors poured into the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool.

"There is still a lot of energy inside the Nine Shadows Forbidden Pool, which is enough to accommodate tens of thousands of True Ancestors to cultivate, but it is estimated that it can only last for a few million years before it runs out of energy!"

After reading it, the bloody general commented.

"It can only be used for a few million years, isn't that not valuable?"

Ye Tian frowned.

"You can add it!" Ouyang Jiu'er glanced at Ye Tian and said.

"That's good!" General Bloody nodded, "Miss Jiu'er is right, the energy inside the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool can be replenished, otherwise wouldn't it be a waste of time for the Nine Shades Sect to build the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool! "

"Then do we still have forbidden treasures in Black Wind Mountain?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Naturally, there is!" General Bloody said, "We still have a lot of forbidden treasures in Black Wind Mountain, but if we want to use them, we definitely need to ask for the consent of the Ten Kings." In addition, we must restrict the cultivation of entering the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool, and we must pay a certain amount of treasures or points, otherwise Black Wind Mountain will not be able to hold on no matter how rich it is!"

"That's for sure!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Of course, the True Ancestor who participated in the Great War this time would definitely be given some cultivation time to a greater or lesser extent, and as for the True Ancestor who did not participate in the battle, if he wanted to borrow the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool to cultivate, he would have to pay a lot of treasures and points.

As for Ye Tian and these generals, they also need to pay a price, but the cultivation time of the reward will inevitably not be less.

Especially Ye Tian, this time he provided information, otherwise how would Black Wind Mountain obtain the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool.

Moreover, Ye Tian showed the combat power of the invincible True Ancestor, and his status was second only to the Blood Demon General.

After some discussion.

In the end, Ye Tian was given 1.5 million years of cultivation time, Ouyang Jiu'er was also given 1.5 million years of cultivation time, and General Bloody Demon and General Ferris only had 1 million years of cultivation time.

The other generals more or less shared hundreds of thousands of years of cultivation time, and finally the peak masters obtained about 100,000 years or tens of thousands of years of cultivation time.

That's it.

The first batch of True Ancestors entered the Nine Shadows Forbidden Pool and began their long-term cultivation.

1.5 million years of cultivation time seems like a lot, but in fact, if you cultivate in a time-accelerated environment, 10,000 times faster time is equivalent to 15,000 years.

Nine Secluded Taboo Pools.

Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er were not far away, and they began to cultivate together.

Rumble!!!!

Endless Nine Shades Forbidden Energy poured into Ye Tian's body, making him feel the effect of the Emperor's Slurry.

And under the acceleration of 10,000 times the time, Ye Tian urged the Nine Extremes True Technique, constantly refining his True Ancestor power and physical body.

However, it is a pity that although this energy contains the power of the Dark Forbidden Lotus, it is too gentle, far inferior to the energy in the Forbidden Black Lotus, and it has little effect on the improvement of Ye Tian's Forbidden Body.

The main improvement of this energy is cultivation, so that the cultivation of the true ancestors can be improved quickly, and it does not need to be accumulated for a long time, and some bottlenecks can be easily broken.

In this way, the strength of many True Ancestors was rapidly improving.

In the blink of an eye, more than 10,000 years have passed.

And Ye Tian had been cultivating in the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool for a full 1.5 million years, and he had used up his cultivation time.

So, Ye Tian left the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool.

"I've improved so much!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He is different from those generals, those generals have basically reached the peak realm of the Great Dao, even if they have not reached the extreme of the Great Dao realm, they are not too far behind, so the improvement of cultivation is limited.

It's just that the effect of refining the flesh in the Nine Shades Taboo Pool is also very good, and many Chaos Body Refining Techniques can also be cultivated to perfection in the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool.

Therefore, those generals were still able to gain a certain amount of strength improvement in the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool.

Compared to Ye Tian, their ascension was too slow.

When Ye Tian entered the Nine Secluded Forbidden Pool, he cultivated to the peak realm of the late stage of the Great Dao.

Now, the bottleneck has been crossed in one fell swoop, and the cultivation has reached the peak realm of the Great Dao, which is not too far from the true consummation limit.

In addition, Ye Tian's refining effect is also very good, although the forbidden body has not improved much, but the degree of physical body improvement is very high.

He cultivated the Nine Extremes True Formula, containing the Nine Extremes True Body Formula, and now he has also cultivated to the eighth pole in the physical body, which is not too far away from the consummate ninth pole.

Due to the unity of Ye Tian's essence and spirit, the soul was nourished by the power of the True Ancestor and the power of the physical body, and the ascension speed was also extremely fast, almost on par with these two aspects.

It can be said that his cultivation in the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool over the years has made his strength reach a huge leap.

If it is described by a standard, then he is definitely the top invincible true ancestor now, at the same level as the Bloody General, and even surpasses the Bloody General in some aspects.
